fields.name: Hammered Card
fields.description: The premium textured card stock will add a beautiful finish to suit a variety of papercraft projects. Each sheet is 300gsm with a hammered finish.

fields.name: Ivory Card
fields.description: With 100 sheets included in this pack you will be able to create lots of projcects for your papercrafts, scrapbooking and more. The ivory colour and with each sheet being 160gsm it will enhance any project.

fields.name: Pastel Paper
fields.description: Get creative with this pack of pastel paper, just waiting to be cut, folded, or decorated to create the most stunning projects. Each sheet is 80gsm and there are 100 sheets included in this pack.

fields.name: Design Paper Pad
fields.description: The stunning mint and rose paper pad will be a perfect addition to scrapbooking being its acid and lignin free. The pad has 10 chic designs in 6 x 6 inches.

fields.name: Foam Sheets
fields.description: The foam sheets are perfect for 3D projects and to add unique texture and dimension to your crafts. Its ideal for kids crafts, toy-making, papercrafts, school projects and more. Each sheet is 1.8mm thick with 12 sheets included in the pack.

fields.name: Assorted Foam Sheets
fields.description: Assorted pack of foam sheets for a variety of projects for you and the kids. Add texture and colour to your Christmas cards. Each sheet is 11.8 x 8.9 inches with 16 sheets included in this pack.

fields.name: Soft Grip Scissors
fields.description: This trio of soft grip scissors offer a comfortable use while crafting. The set includes dressmaker, sewing and embroidery scissors, in sizes 14cm, 20cm and 22cm, witha aubergine colour grip handle.

fields.name: Soft Grip Craft Knife
fields.description: The soft grip craft knife is ideal for model making, papercrafts and more. The set includes a No.1 soft grip handle of 125mm, in blue, with a magnetic end for picking up blades, plus 6 No.1 blades and storage case.

fields.name: Cutting Mat
fields.description: The double-sided cutting mat features imperial and metric measurements, and is ideal for various crafts such as haberdashery, papercrafts and more. The cutting surface is self-healing for long term use and to protect your worktops. The mat is 36 x 24 inches with grid dimensions of 35 x 23 inches.

fields.name: Xcut Glass Cutting Board
fields.description: Th Xcut tempered glass cutting mat is ideal for your papercrafting. The glass mat is easy for cutting on and with its smooth surface, easy to clean.

fields.name: Monogram Alphabet Stencil
fields.description: This alphabet stencil brings you an intricate laser-cut design that is ideal for adding personalised monograms to your projects. The stencil is durable and can be reused so that you can add the same design as many times as you wish. It features the uppercase alphabet, along with some symbols and measures 8.3 x 11.4 inches.

fields.name: Magical Butterflies Stencil
fields.description: This butterfly stencil brings you an intricate laser-cut design that is ideal for adding a magical theme to your projects. The stencil is durable and can be reused so that you can add the same design as many times as you wish. It features various sizes of butterflies, along with some stars and dots, and measures 8.3 x 11.4 inches.

fields.name: Spectra AD Markers
fields.description: Make your mark with these floral Spectra AD markers. These alcohol-based markers with dual tips can create a variety of effects for your project. With 12 colours in the pack you can create designs from intricate details with the flexible brush, to broad strokes with the unique tri-nib.

fields.name: Artmaker Calligraphy Kit
fields.description: With the Artmaker calligraphy kit you will learn contemporary lettering to create unique handmade keepsakes to treasure. The set offers guidance with a 48-page instruction book by professional calligraphers Joanna Chia and Peter Taylor to help you master the basic letter formation and line weights, and different lettering and calligraphy styles of six scripts.

fields.name: Faber-Castell Pencils
fields.description: These Faber-Castell pencils are the perfect choice for writing, drawing and sketching. This set comes with eight pitt graphite matt pencils that are grades HB to 14B, which includes a wiper, eraser and sharpener. The break-resistant, artist-quality pencils give you the highest tonal value density for maximum depth effect and smooth graphite application.

fields.name: Sketching Pencils
fields.description: This is the perfect set of 12 sketching pencils for budding artists to create perfect sketches, line drawings and more. This set includes pencil grades of 6H, 4H, 3H, 2H, H, HB, B, 2B, 3B, 4B, 6B and 8B to practice your techniques and create a range of effects.

fields.name: Drafting Set
fields.description: The drafting set is comprised of an array of tools to help you create precise blueprints and geometric compositions. Every tool is designed for maximum precision and accuracy, allowing you to draw and measure with ease. The set includes a 30cm ruler, a 30cm triangular scale, a technical compass set, a 15cm semi-circle protractor, a technical drawing pencil with 2mm lead, and 2 set squares with a 45 degree angle and a 60 degree angle.

fields.name: Desktop Planning Pad
fields.description: Plan ahead using the desktop planning pad set so you never forget appointments or anything on your list, ideal for either work or at home. The planning pads includes a weekly planner, a monthly planner, and a to-do list, to fill out as you see fit to organise you plans.

fields.name: Printable Acetate Sheets
fields.description: These Seawhite printable acetate sheets are ideal for presentations and more. You'll be able to project your image with a standard overhead projector and add layers. The sheets lay flat give great results with 10 sheets included, they are sompatible with colour copiers and laser printers with black or colour dry toner inks.

fields.name: Heat Resistant Acitate Sheets
fields.description: Take your craft project to the next level with Crafters Companion heat resistant acetate. You'll be able to add dimension and unique detail to your designs by heat embossing, laser print foiling and more with this pack, which includes 12 sheets of 100micron of clear acetate.
